Uses of Annotation Interface
net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation.Explain

Packages that use Explain
Package
Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.board
Provides classes used to manage Board Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.bpm
Provides classes used to manage BPMN (Business Process Model and Notation) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.chart.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.cheneer.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.classdiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.command
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML End User Common Commands.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.command.note
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.crash
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML or Graphviz Crash.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.descdiagram
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Description Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.descdiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.ebnf
Provides classes used to manage EBNF (Extended Backus–Naur Form) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.flowdiagram
Provides classes used to manage Flow Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.gantt.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.help
Provides classes used to manage Help list.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.sprite
Provides classes used to manage Sprite.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.mindmap
Provides classes used to manage Mindmap Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.objectdiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.regexdiagram
Provides classes used to manage Regular expression (Regex) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.salt
Provides classes used to manage Salt (or Wireframe) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sequencediagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.statediagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.style
Provides classes used to manage Style.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.timingdiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.wbs
Provides classes used to manage WBS Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.wire
Provides classes used to manage Wire or Block Diagram.
